source_method: Built-in image generation using current official IKEA KLIPPBOK product and installed-context photographs as strict hardware references
post_processing: None; the generated 1536x1024 source is the published cover.

visual_review.full_size: PASS — the KLIPPBOK is recognizable and prominent in a warm, practical laundry-room scene with natural materials and a restrained dark-green accent
visual_review.article_16x10_crop: PASS — the KLIPPBOK, washing machine, floor placement, and residential context remain clear with no awkward crop
visual_review.card_16x9_crop: PASS — the product remains recognizable at card size and the practical leak-detection context stays intact
visual_review.prohibited_elements: PASS — no embedded headline, fake chart, decorative route line, translucent panel, inset frame, floating UI card, progress bar, generic diagram, logo, or watermark
